prompt:
A tasting notes sheet documenting a blind stevia test, with several impression marks and simple flavor-profile sketches indicating sweetness, onset, and aftertaste without readable words. A few coded sample cups nearby help show that the notes came from a controlled comparison. The page should feel more narrative and impression-based than a formal panel scorecard, while still structured and deliberate.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future food-lab aesthetic: soft tabletop lighting, realistic paper, glassware, and pencil textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the notes sheet centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a tasting-record item.
